arts.ttl: Sources: AC Milan leading chase to sign Walker
arts.sum: AC Milan are leading the chase for Kyle Walker after he told Manchester City he wants to leave the club, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Milan’s Noah Okafor set to join RB Leipzig
